---
name: New translation or locale
about: Propose a new locale or update translated UI copy
title: "[translation] "
labels: [i18n, docs]
---

## Locale

Which locale is this for?

## Surface

Which UI surface is being translated?

- desktop
- iOS
- Android
- docs / proof surface copy

## Glossary

List terms that must stay consistent:

- Live Lens
- Living Lens
- prediction consistency
- temporal continuity
- surprise
- persistence

## Scope

What is included?

- new strings
- updated strings
- screenshots
- locale files
- glossary updates

## Constraints

Call out any strings that must remain unchanged:

- model names
- endpoint paths
- numeric values
- feature flags

## Review

Describe how you will verify the translation for meaning, layout, and technical accuracy.

## Notes

If the surface has a separate CC-BY-SA notice, mention it here.
